FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.27sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f31da963b00>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-01T00:15:37Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-01T00:14:00Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-05-01T00:15:37Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-01T00:14:00Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/01 00:17:13.220629523 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220635765 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220702178 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220703922 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220724670 {
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220725652 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220742404 new <- list()
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220743686 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220758784 new$width <- width
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220759926 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220774604 new$height <- height
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220775415 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220787764 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220843132 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220844815 new$title <- title
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220859702 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220860694 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220875211 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220875973 new$version <- version
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220899376 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220900418 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220915733 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220952001 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220969367 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220971000 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220981450 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220981880 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220990015 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220990456 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220999874 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221000305 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221016805 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221017276 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221029790 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221040500 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221041341 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221053414 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221053885 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221091641 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221093815 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221115335 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221116307 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221133840 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221134742 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221165589 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221166731 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221182761 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221183613 "default"))
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221199172 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221200064 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221216314 }
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221217216 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221231572 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221232484 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221248113 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221249055 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221265696 }
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221266618 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221281235 }
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221282317 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221296153 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221297025 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221311932 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221312784 domain = NA)
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221335390 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221337855 }
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221362250 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221363723 old$family <- family
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221380985 }
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221381847 version <- old$version
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221393869 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221394400 "2.0")
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221403096 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221403527 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221414067 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221414487 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221435276 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221436278 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221453160 domain = NA)
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221453681 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221464180 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221464681 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221477776 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221478246 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221497112 invisible()
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221498915 }

2026/05/01 00:17:13.220702178 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/05/01 00:17:13.220724670 {

2026/05/01 00:17:13.220759926 if (!missing(height))

2026/05/01 00:17:13.220875973 new$version <- version
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220899376 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220900418 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220915733 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220952001 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220969367 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220971000 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220981450 if (!missing(fg))

2026/05/01 00:17:13.220990015 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220990456 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/01 00:17:13.220999874 if (!missing(pagecentre))

2026/05/01 00:17:13.221016805 if (!missing(colormodel))

2026/05/01 00:17:13.221041341 if (!missing(useKerning))

2026/05/01 00:17:13.221093815 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221115335 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221116307 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221133840 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221134742 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/05/01 00:17:13.221183613 "default"))
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221199172 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221200064 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221216314 }

2026/05/01 00:17:13.221248113 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/05/01 00:17:13.221265696 }
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221266618 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221281235 }
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221282317 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221296153 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]

2026/05/01 00:17:13.221311932 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221312784 domain = NA)
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221335390 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221337855 }
2026/05/01 00:17:13.221362250 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")

2026/05/01 00:17:13.221380985 }
